ingredients_text: CARBONATED WATER, ACIDITY REGULATORS (CITRIC ACID PRESERVATIVES (SORBIC ACID, BENZOIC ACID), SWEETENERS (SUCRALISE ROMIAN CITRATE), ERYTHRITOL, TAURINE (400 mg/100ml), FLAVORS (0) MATURE-IDENTICAL & ARTIFICIAL (CITRUS FRUIT FLAVORING SUBSTANCES ACESULFAME POTASSIUM), CAFFEINE 30mg/100ml (300ppm), VITAMINS (05, B3, B6, B12), D-GLUCURONOLACTONE, INOSITOL (2 mg/100ml),
